prompt: A romantic high-fashion travel campaign image set in a sunlit Spanish coastal village at golden hour, viewed down a narrow cobblestone stair street descending toward the sea. Whitewashed Mediterranean houses line both sides of the alley, with textured stucco walls, terracotta roof tiles, black wrought-iron balconies, wall-mounted lanterns, and many potted plants and flowers. On the right side, show 2 wrought-iron balconies, 2 wall lanterns, 1 vivid deep-blue door, and at least 8 terracotta pots with green plants mounted or placed along the facade. On the left edge, frame the scene with bright pink bougainvillea blossoms in the foreground. In the distance, the calm ocean reflects the warm sunset, with a rocky coastline and glowing horizon under a soft peach-and-gold sky. In the lower middle of the street, place 1 couple walking away hand in hand: a woman in a flowing light summer dress and a man in a pale shirt and shorts, small in scale to emphasize the environment. Composition is vertical editorial poster style, luxurious, serene, cinematic, aspirational, with warm golden sunlight casting long shadows and making the white walls glow. Add elegant overlay typography on the upper left in a refined serif font, warm brown color: the large line reads {argument name="headline text" default="España,"}, below it in italic serif reads {argument name="quote" default="siempre en mi corazón."}, with a thin ornamental flourish beneath the text. Include a subtle white {argument name="brand name" default="Pollo.ai"} logo in the upper right corner. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, premium tourism advertising aesthetic, soft atmospheric haze, natural depth, magazine-cover quality.
translatedPrompt: 一张浪漫的高端旅行宣传图片，背景设定在黄金时刻阳光明媚的西班牙沿海村庄，视角沿一条通向大海的狭窄鹅卵石阶梯街道向下延伸。地中海风格的白色房屋排列在巷子两侧，墙面具有纹理感，配有赤陶瓦屋顶、黑色锻铁阳台、壁挂式灯笼以及许多盆栽植物和鲜花。在右侧，展示 2 个锻铁阳台、2 个壁挂式灯笼、1 扇鲜艳的深蓝色大门，以及至少 8 个沿外墙安装或摆放的种有绿色植物的赤陶花盆。在左侧边缘，用前景中明亮的粉色九重葛花朵勾勒场景。远处，平静的海洋映照着温暖的日落，岩石海岸线和发光的地平线在柔和的桃金色天空下显得格外迷人。在街道中下部，放置一对牵手远去的伴侣：女子身穿飘逸的浅色夏装，男子身穿浅色衬衫和短裤，人物比例较小以突出环境。构图采用垂直编辑海报风格，奢华、宁静、具有电影质感且令人向往，温暖的金色阳光投下长长的阴影，使白墙熠熠生辉。在左上方添加优雅的叠层排版，采用精致的衬线字体，颜色为暖棕色：大字行读取 {argument name="headline text" default="España,"}，下方斜体衬线字体读取 {argument name="quote" default="siempre en mi corazón."}，文字下方带有纤细的装饰性花纹。在右上角包含一个微妙的白色 {argument name="brand name" default="Pollo.ai"} 标志。超精细、照片级逼真、高端旅游广告美学、柔和的大气雾感、自然的深度，具备杂志封面级品质。

breakdown.creativeCore: 奢华西班牙日落旅行海报：此提示词可生成一张照片级逼真的垂直旅行宣传海报，展现日落时分浪漫的西班牙海滨小镇，非常适合旅游广告、生活方式品牌推广及社交媒体营销。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, editorial, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: golden hour]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
